rule.description: System Audit: Vulnerable web application found.
Trying to add an agent with duplicate IP.
Listened ports status (netstat) changed (new port opened or closed).
Integrity checksum for agentless device changed.

rule.match: ^ossec: Real-time inotify kernel queue is full.
rule.description: FIM real-time queue is full. Some real-time events may be lost.
Registry Key Entry Added to the System
Host Blocked by firewall-drop Active Response
Host Unblocked by firewall-drop Active Response
Host Blocked by host-deny Active Response
Host Unblocked by host-deny Active Response
Host Blocked by firewall-drop Active Response
Host Unblocked by firewall-drop Active Response
Host Blocked by host-deny Active Response
Host Unblocked by host-deny Active Response
Host Blocked by route-null Active Response
Host Unblocked by route-null Active Response
Active response related to $(script) has been activated, but may not have an effect because the firewall is $(status)
Registry Value Entry Added to the System
Agent event queue is full. Events may be lost.
Agent event queue is flooded. Check the agent configuration.

The maximum limit of files monitored is close to being reached. At this moment there are $(file_count) files and the limit is $(file_limit). If the limit is reached some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

The maximum limit of files monitored is close to being reached. At this moment there are $(file_count) files and the limit is $(file_limit). If the limit is reached some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

The maximum limit of files monitored has been reached. At this moment there are $(file_count) files and the limit is $(file_limit). From this moment some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

The maximum limit of registry keys monitored is close to being reached. At this moment there are $(keys_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). If the limit is reached some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

The maximum limit of registry keys monitored is close to being reached. At this moment there are $(keys_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). If the limit is reached some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

The maximum limit of registry keys monitored has been reached. At this moment there are $(keys_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). From this moment some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

The maximum limit of registry values monitored is close to being reached. At this moment there are $(values_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). If the limit is reached some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

The maximum limit of registry values monitored is close to being reached. At this moment there are $(values_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). If the limit is reached some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

The maximum limit of registry values monitored has been reached. At this moment there are $(values_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). From this moment some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.

rule.match: file system full|No space left on device

rule.description: xinetd: Excessive number connections to a service.

rule.match: Wrong password given for|login failed|Auth: Login incorrect|

rule.description: syslog: User missed the password more than one time
syslog: Connection blocked by Tcp Wrappers.
Connection to rshd from unprivileged port. Possible network scan.
Availability of the system is in risk.
User missed the password to change UID (user id).
User missed the password to change UID to root.

rule.regex: session opened for user root|^'su root'|
rule.description: User successfully changed UID to root.

rule.match: Integrity Check failed: File could not

rule.description: New group added to the system.
New user added to the system.
Group (or user) deleted from the system.
Information from the user was changed.
Three failed attempts to run sudo
Unauthorized user attempted to use sudo.
New dpkg (Debian Package) requested to install.
Possible Disk failure. SCSI controller error.
SCSI RAID ARRAY ERROR, drive failed.
SCSI RAID is now in a degraded status.
sendmail: Sender domain does not have any valid
sendmail: Attempt to use mail server as relay
sendmail: Sender domain is not found
sendmail: Sender address does not have domain
sendmail: Sendmail rejected due to pre-greeting.
sendmail: Sender domain has bogus MX record.
It should not be sending e-mail.
sendmail: Multiple attempts to send e-mail from a
sendmail: Multiple relaying attempts of spam.
sendmail: Multiple attempts to send e-mail
sendmail: Multiple attempts to send e-mail from
sendmail: Multiple rejected e-mails from same source ip.
sendmail: SMF-SAV sendmail milter unable to verify
Postfix: Attempt to use mail server as relay
Postfix: Sender domain is not found
Postfix: Improper use of SMTP command pipelining
Postfix: Recipient address must contain FQDN
Postfix: IP Address black-listed by anti-spam (blocked).

rule.match: ^fatal: the Postfix mail system is not running

rule.description: Postfix: too many errors after RCPT from unknown
Postfix: Multiple relaying attempts of spam.
Postfix: Multiple attempts to send e-mail from
Postfix: Multiple misuse of SMTP service
Postfix: Multiple attempts to send e-mail to
invalid recipient or from unknown sender domain.
Postfix: Multiple attempts to send e-mail from
Postfix: RBL lookup error: Host or domain name not found
Postfix: Illegal address from unknown sender
Imapd Multiple failed logins from same source ip.
ms-exchange: Multiple e-mail attempts to an invalid account.
Courier: Multiple connection attempts from same source.
PIX: Attempt to connect from a blocked (shunned) IP.
PIX: The PIX is disallowing new connections.
PIX: Firewall failover pair communication problem.
PIX: User created or modified on the Firewall.
PIX: Multiple attack in progress messages.
Netscreen firewall: Multiple critical messages from
Netscreen firewall: Multiple alert messages from
Cisco IOS: Successful login to the router
Cisco IOS: Failed login to the router
PAM: Attempt to login with an invalid user.
PAM: Multiple failed logins in a small period of time.

rule.match: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory

rule.description: telnetd: Connection refused by TCP Wrappers.
telnetd: Remote host established a telnet connection.
telnetd: Reverse lookup error (bad hostname config).
telnetd: Multiple connection attempts from same source
sshd: Possible attack on the ssh server (or version gathering).
sshd: Reverse lookup error (bad ISP or attack).
sshd: Possible breakin attempt (high number of reverse lookup errors).
sshd: Possible scan or breakin attempt (high number of login timeouts).

rule.match: Did not receive identification string from

rule.description: sshd: Attempt to login using a non-existent user
sshd: brute force trying to get access to the system. Non existent user.
sshd: Attempt to login using a denied user.
sshd: Multiple access attempts using a denied user.

rule.match: error: buffer_get_bignum2_ret: negative numbers not supported
rule.info: This maybe a bad key in authorized_keys.
This error may relate to ssh key handling.

rule.description: sshd: Attempt to start sshd when something already bound to the port.

rule.match: Authentication service cannot retrieve user credentials
rule.info: May be related to PAM module errors.
rule.description: sshd: Authentication services were not able to retrieve user credentials.

rule.regex: error: connect to \S+ port \d+ failed: Connection refused
rule.description: sshd: SSHD is not accepting connections.
sshd: cannot bind to configured address.
sshd: pam_loginuid could not open loginuid.
sshd: brute force trying to get access to the system. Authentication failed.
Solaris: User failed to change UID (user id).
Asterisk: Multiple failed logins (user enumeration in process).
Asterisk: Login session failed (invalid iax user).

rule.match: Don't know how to respond via

rule.description: MS-DHCP: An IP address was found to be in use on the network.
MS-DHCP: A lease request could not be satisfied because the scope's address pool was exhausted.
MS-DHCP: A BOOTP request could not be satisfied because the scope's address pool for BOOTP was exhausted.
MS-DHCP: Packet dropped due to NAP policy.
MS-DHCP: Service not authorized in AD.
MS-DHCP: Service has not determined if it is authorized in AD.
Arpwatch: "flip flop" message. IP address/MAC relation changing too often.
Arpwatch: Changed network interface for ip address.
arpwatch probably run with wrong permissions
Arpwatch: An IP has reverted to an old ethernet address.
Symantec-AV: Virus scan updated,started or stopped.
Symantec-WS: Login failed accessing the web proxy.
Symantec-WS: Login success accessing the web proxy.
Symantec-WS: Admin Login success to the web proxy.
Trend: Virus detected and unable to clean up.
Trend: Virus scan completed with no errors detected.
Trend: Virus scan passed by found potential security risk.

rule.match: failed (LOGIN)| Login failed | Authentication failed| Failed login

rule.description: cimserver: Compaq Insight Manager authentication failure.

rule.match: user not found|User not known|unknown user|auth failed

rule.description: Dovecot brute force attack (multiple auth failures).

rule.match: user not found|User not known|unknown user|auth failed

rule.description: vm-pop3d: Login failed accessing the pop3 server.
vm-pop3d: POP3 brute force (multiple failed logins).
vpopmail: Attempt to login to vpopmail with invalid username.
vpopmail: Attempt to login to vpopmail with empty password.
FTPD: Remote host connected to FTP server.,
FTPD: Connection blocked by Tcp Wrappers.
FTPD: Multiple FTP failed login attempts.
FTPD: User disconnected due to time out.
FTPD: Attempt to login with disabled account.
ProFTPD: Attempt to login using a non-existent user.
ProFTPD: Login failed accessing the FTP server.
ProFTPD: Connection denied by ProFTPD configuration.
ProFTPD: Connection refused by TCP Wrappers.

rule.info: US-Cert Note VU#328867: Multiple vendors' firewalls do not adequately keep state of FTP traffic
rule.description: ProFTPD: Attempt to bypass firewall that can't adequately keep state of FTP traffic.
ProFTPD: Remote host connected to FTP server.
ProFTPD: Remote host disconnected due to inactivity.
ProFTPD: Remote host disconnected due to login time out.
ProFTPD: Remote host disconnected due to time out.
ProFTPD: FTP server Buffer overflow attempt.

ProFTPD: Multiple connection attempts from same source.
ProFTPD: Multiple timed out logins from same source.
pure-ftpd: Attempt to access invalid directory
pure-ftpd: FTP brute force (multiple failed logins).
pure-ftpd: Multiple connection attempts from same source.

rule.match: [INFO] \S+ is now logged in| is now logged in

rule.match: dropping source port zero packet from
rule.description: Invalid DNS packet. Possibility of attack.
Failed attempt to perform a zone transfer.
DNS update using RFC2136 Dynamic protocol.
Named fatal error. DNS service going down.

rule.regex: ^transfer of \S+ from \S+ failed while receiving \S+ REFUSED

rule.match: zone transfer deferred due to quota

rule.description: Syntax error in a named configuration file.

rule.regex: refresh: retry limit for master \S+ exceeded

rule.match: reloading configuration failed: unexpected end of input

rule.description: Zone has been removed from a master server
Zone transfer failed, unable to connect to master.
Could not listen on IPv6 interface.
Could not bind to an interface.
Could not open configuration file, permission denied.
Could not open configuration file, permission denied.

rule.match: reloading configuration failed: out of memory
rule.description: Server does not have enough memory to reload the configuration.
Samba: User action denied by configuration.
Samba: An attempt has been made to start smbd but the process is already running.
Samba: An attempt has been made to start nmbd but the process is already running.

rule.regex: segfault at \S+ ip \S+ sp \S+ error \d+ in

rule.description: Windows: Failed attempt to perform a privileged operation.
Windows: User account disabled or deleted.
Windows: User account locked out (multiple login errors).
Windows: First time this user logged in this system.

Windows: Logon Failure - Account currently disabled.
Windows: Logon Failure - Specified account expired.

Windows: Logon Failure - Account's password expired.
Windows: Logon Failure - Account locked out.

rule.info: This does not appear to be logged on Windows 2000.

Windows: Multiple remote access login failures.

Chrome Remote Desktop attempt - access denied
McAfee Windows AV - Virus detected and not removed.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus detected and properly removed.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus detected and file will be deleted.
McAfee Windows AV - Scan started or stopped.
McAfee Windows AV - Scan completed with no viruses found.

rule.match: scan was cancelled |has taken too long
rule.description: McAfee Windows AV - Virus scan cancelled.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus scan cancelled due to shutdown.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus program or DAT update succeeded.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus program or DAT update failed.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus program or DAT update cancelled.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Virus detected, but unable to remove.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Virus detected and properly removed.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Suspicious activity detected.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Real time protection failed.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Loading definitions failed. Using last good set.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Engine update failed.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Definitions update failed.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Scan error. Scan has stopped.
Microsoft Security Essentials - Scan stopped before completion.
Multiple Microsoft Security Essentials AV warnings detected.
Multiple Microsoft Security Essentials AV error detected.
Virtual machine state changed to OFF.
Multiple VMWare ESX user authentication failures.
Multiple IDS alerts for same id.
Multiple IDS events from same source ip.
Multiple IDS events from same source ip
Multiple IDS alerts for same id
URL too long. Higher than allowed on most
Multiple SQL injection attempts from same
Multiple common web attacks from same source ip.
Multiple web server 501 error code (Not Implemented).
Multiple web server 500 error code (Internal Error).
Multiple web server 503 error code (Service unavailable).
Apache: Attempt to access forbidden file or directory.
Apache: Attempt to access forbidden directory index.

rule.info: CERT: Advisory CA-2001-19 "Code Red" Worm Exploiting Buffer Overflow In IIS Indexing Service DLL

rule.description: Apache: Attempt to login using a non-existent user.

rule.match: File name too long|request failed: URI too long
rule.description: Apache: Invalid URI, file name too long.
Apache: Attempt to access forbidden file or directory.

rule.description: Apache: Client sent malformed Host header. Possible Code Red attack.

rule.match: failed to open stream: No such file or directory|
rule.description: Apache: Attempt to access an non-existent file (those are reported on the access.log).

no user/password was provided for basic authentication

rule.description: Nginx: Invalid URI, file name too long.

rule.match: expects parameter 1 to be string, array given in
bytes written, possibly out of free disk space in
rule.description: PHP internal error (server out of space).

rule.match: Failed opening required |Call to undefined function
rule.description: PHP internal error (missing file or function).
WordPress Comment Spam (coming from a fake search engine UA).
osCommerce file manager login.php bypass attempt.
Blacklisted user agent (known malicious user agent).
CMS (WordPress or Joomla) brute force attempt.
High amount of POST requests in a small period of time (likely bot).
Anomaly URL query (attempting to pass null termination).
Squid: Unauthorized: Failed attempt to access
Squid: Forbidden: Attempt to access forbidden file
Squid: Not Found: Attempt to access non-existent
Squid: Proxy Authentication Required: User is not
Squid: Attempt to access a Beagle worm (or variant)

rule.description: Squid: Attempt to access a worm/trojan related site.
Squid: Multiple attempts to access forbidden file
or directory from same source ip.
Squid: Multiple unauthorized attempts to use proxy.

rule.info: W32.Beagle.DP is a Worm that drops Trojan.Lodear and opens a back door on the compromised computer.

rule.description: Squid: Multiple attempts to access a non-existent file.
Squid: Multiple attempts to access a worm/trojan/virus
related web site. System probably infected.
System user successfully logged to the system.
Buffer overflow on WU-FTPD versions prior to 2.6
Heap overflow in the Solaris cachefsd service.

rule.match: attempt to execute code on stack by
rule.description: Stack overflow attempt or program exiting
Network scan from same source ip.

rule.match: Failed to get unit file state for
rule.description: Systemd: Failed to get unit state for service. This means that the .service file is missing
Systemd: Service has entered a failed state, and likely has not started.
Systemd: Service exited due to a failure.
Systemd: System time has been changed.
Dropbear: Bad password attempt for non existent user.
Dropbear: User successfully logged in using a password.
Dropbear: User successfully logged in using a public key.
Dropbear: dropbear brute force attempt for nonexistent user.
A filesystem was not properly unmounted, likely system crash
UKC was used, possibly modifying a kernel at boot time.
Unknown ACPI event (bug 6299 in OpenBSD bug tracking system).
hotplugd could not open a file.
doas cannot stat a file due to permissions.
A critical path for doas does not have secure permissions.
A doas command was run as root.

rule.match: Incremental update failed|Error while reading database from|Update failed.
rule.description: ClamAV: Could not download the incremental virus definition updates.
Sysmon - Suspicious Process - lsm.exe is a Parent Image
Sysmon - Suspicious Process - lsass.exe is a Parent Image

rule.match: ^Could not run: Address already in use
rule.description: Puppet Master: not run - address in use

rule.match: ^Could not|^You cannot|^too few arguments|^Duplicate declaration|^Unrecognised escape sequence|^Invalid parameter|is not|has not been tested|Unknown function|failed|has failure
^Could not|not found|^Not collecting|^The environment must be|^Syntax error|^Failed|failed|has failure
^Unable to fetch|does not support|Not using cache|Could not retrieve|Failed|failed|has failure

rule.description: Serv-U: Attempt to login using anonymous user
Auditd: Execution of a file ended abnormally.
Auditd: File or a directory access ended abnormally.
Auditd: Failure of the Abstract Machine Test Utility (AMTU) detected.
Auditd: Maximum amount of Discretionary Access Control (DAC) or Mandatory Access Control (MAC) failures reached.

Auditd: Login attempt reached the maximum amount of concurrent sessions.

Audit: Passwd was used to unlock an account.

OpenSCAP ERROR: Wrong configuration - Invalid policy.
OpenSCAP ERROR: Wrong configuration - Inexistent profile.

rule.description: Fortigate: Multiple changed configuration events from same source.

rule.description: HP 5500 EI - Warning event: Authentication failure
OpenVPN: Certificate failed - Possible revoked user
RSA Authentication Manager: Multiple authentication failures.
Cisco eStreamer: SERVER-MYSQL failed login attempt

Cisco eStreamer: SERVER-MYSQL show databases attempt

Windows Defender: taken action to protect machine from unwanted software

rule.description: SQL Server Network Interface library unregistered

rule.regex: Unauthorized not authorized on \S+ to execute command
rule.description: MongoDB: Execute commands without the necessary privileges

rule.regex: Maximum authentication retries for user (\w+) exceeded
rule.description: VShell user used the maximum number of password attempts.

rule.regex: Connection from (\d+.\d+.\d+.\d+) rejected by Deny Hosts file
rule.description: Host is trying to connect to VShell server but exists in the deny file.
VShell multiple connection attempts within 2 minute by a host in the deny file, potential DOS or brute force attempt.
VShell host has exceeded the number of failed login attempts and has been added to the Hosts Deny file.

VirusTotal: Error: API request timed out
Proxmox VE brute force (multiple failed logins).

rule.match: Passed filename is not valid, might be malicious

rule.description: $(vuls.scanned_cve) has a update date lower than $(vuls.days) days.

Low vulnerability $(vuls.scanned_cve) detected in scanning launched on c with $(vuls.assurance) reliability ($(vuls.detection_method)). Score: $(vuls.core) ($(vuls.source)). Affected packages: $(vuls.affected_packages)

Medium vulnerability $(vuls.scanned_cve) detected in scanning launched on $(vuls.scan_date) with $(vuls.assurance) reliability ($(vuls.detection_method)). $(vuls.tittle). Score: $(vuls.score) ($(vuls.source)). Affected packages: $(vuls.affected_packages)

High vulnerability $(vuls.scanned_cve) detected in scanning launched on $(vuls.scan_date) with $(vuls.assurance) reliability ($(vuls.detection_method)). $(vuls.tittle). Score: $(vuls.score) ($(vuls.source)). Affected packages: $(vuls.affected_packages)

Critical vulnerability $(vuls.scanned_cve) detected in scanning launched on $(vuls.scan_date) with $(vuls.assurance) reliability ($(vuls.detection_method)). $(vuls.tittle). Score: $(vuls.score) ($(vuls.source)). Affected packages: $(vuls.affected_packages)
Vulnerability $(vuls.scanned_cve) affects critical parts of the system.
CIS-CAT Report overview: Score less than 50% ($(cis.score))
CIS-CAT Report overview: Score less than 50% ($(cis-data.score) %)
CIS-CAT Report overview: Score less than 30% ($(cis.score))
CIS-CAT Report overview: Score less than 30% ($(cis-data.score) %)

Docker: Started shell session in container $(docker.Actor.Attributes.name)
Docker: Copied a file from host to $(docker.Actor.Attributes.name)
Docker: Copied a file from $(docker.Actor.Attributes.name) to host
Docker: Image created from imported data

User account locked out (multiple login errors)
First time this user logged in this system

Security Enabled Global Group Member Removed $(win.eventdata.memberSid)

Denied RODC Password Replication Group Changed

Windows DC integrity check on decrypted
Windows DC - Clock skew too great

Chrome remote desktop attempt - Client connected $(win.eventdata.data).
Chrome remote desktop attempt - started connection from $(win.eventdata.data).
Windows Search Service indexed data for user successfully removed in response to user profile deletion.

rule.info: This does not appear to be logged on Windows 2000

rule.description: Sysmon - Suspicious Process - lsm.exe is a Parent Image
Sysmon - Suspicious Process - lsass.exe is a Parent Image
Short-time multiple Windows Defender error events
Short-time multiple Windows Defender warning events
Windows Defender: Antimalware scan was stopped before it finished
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine found $(win.eventdata.severityName) malware or other potentially unwanted software
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform performed an action to protect your system from malware or other potentially unwanted software
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform failed to perform an action to protect your system from malware or other potentially unwanted software
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform restored an item from quarantine at $(win.eventdata.path)
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform could not restore an item from quarantine at $(win.eventdata.path)
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform deleted an item from quarantine at $(win.eventdata.path)
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform could not delete an item from quarantine at $(win.eventdata.path)
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform deleted history of malware and other potentially unwanted software
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform could not delete history of malware and other potentially unwanted software
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform detected suspicious $(win.eventdata.detectionType) behaviour ($(win.eventdata.processName))
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform detected $(win.eventdata.severityName) potentially unwanted software ($(win.eventdata.processName))
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform performed an action to protect you from potentially unwanted software ($(win.eventdata.processName))
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform failed performing an action to protect you from potentially unwanted software ($(win.eventdata.processName))
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform encountered a critical error when attempting to perform an action over the potentially unwanted software
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform has deduced the hashes for a threat resource
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform is running and in a healthy state
Windows Defender: Endpoint Protection client health report
Windows Defender: Antimalware definitions updated successfully
Windows Defender: Antimalware definition update failed
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine updated successfully
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine update failed
Windows Defender: Error while attempting to load antimalware definitions
Windows Defender: Error while attempting to load antimalware engine because the antimalware platform is outdated
Windows Defender: Error while attempting to update antimalware platform
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform will soon be updated
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine used Dynamic Signature Service to get additional definitions
Windows Defender: DSS deleted the outdated dynamic definitions
Windows Defender: Error while attempting to use Dynamic Signature Service
Windows Defender: Dynamic Signature Service deleted all dynamic definitions
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine downloaded a clean file
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine failed to download a clean file
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine was downloaded and is configured to run offline on the next system restart
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine was unable to download and configure an offline scan
Windows Defender: Antimalware support for this Operating System will soon end
Windows Defender: Antimalware support for this Operating System has ended
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine no longer supports this Operating System
Windows Defender: $(win.eventdata.feature) real-time protection encountered an error and failed
Windows Defender: $(win.eventdata.feature) real-time protection recovered from a failure
Windows Defender: Antivirus real-time protection is enabled
Windows Defender: Antivirus real-time protection is disabled
Windows Defender: Antivirus real-time protection feature configuration has changed
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform feature configuration changed
Windows Defender: Antimalware engine encountered an error and failed because of $(win.eventdata.failureType) at $(win.eventdata.resource)
Windows Defender: Antivirus scanning for malware and other potentially unwanted software is enabled
Windows Defender: Antivirus scanning for malware and other potentially unwanted software is disabled
Windows Defender: Antivirus scanning for viruses is enabled
Windows Defender: Antivirus scanning for viruses is disabled
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform will expire soon
Windows Defender: Antimalware platform is expired due to error $(win.eventdata.errorCode)
Windows Defender: ERROR: BAD INPUT DATA
Windows Defender: ERROR: THREAT NOT FOUND
Windows Defender: ERROR: FULL SCAN REQUIRED
Windows Defender: ERROR: MANUAL STEPS REQUIRED
Windows Defender: ERROR: REMOVE NOT SUPPORTED
Windows Defender: ERROR: REMOVE LOW MEDIUM DISABLED
Windows Defender: ERROR: UI CONSOLIDATION BASE
Windows Defender: ERROR: NO INTERNET CONNECTION

Windows Defender: ERROR: CODE ALREADY SHUTDOWN
Windows Defender: ERROR: CODE ASYNC CALL PENDING

Windows Defender: ERROR: BAD DB: OPEN

Windows Firewall With Advanced Security informational event
Windows Firewall With Advanced Security warning event
Windows Firewall With Advanced Security: Windows Defender Firewall enabled.
Windows Firewall With Advanced Security: Windows Defender Firewall disabled.
Windows Firewall With Advanced Security: $(win.eventdata.ruleId) rule has been added to the Windows Defender Firewall exception list.
Windows Firewall With Advanced Security: $(win.eventdata.ruleId) rule has been modified in the Windows Defender Firewall exception list.
Windows Firewall With Advanced Security: $(win.eventdata.ruleId) rule has been deleted in the Windows Defender Firewall exception list.
Multiple Windows Firewall With Advanced Security warning events
Multiple Windows Firewall With Advanced Security error events
McAfee Windows AV - Virus detected and not removed.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus detected and properly removed.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus detected and file will be deleted.
McAfee Windows AV - Scan started or stopped.
McAfee Windows AV - Scan completed with no viruses found.

rule.field: scan was cancelled |has taken too long
rule.description: McAfee Windows AV - Virus scan cancelled.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus scan cancelled due to shutdown.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus program or DAT update succeeded.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus program or DAT update failed.
McAfee Windows AV - Virus program or DAT update cancelled.
A Windows log file was cleared
Microsoft security essentials - Virus detected, but unable to remove.
Microsoft security essentials - Virus detected and properly removed.
Microsoft security essentials - Suspicious activity detected.
Microsoft security essentials - Real time protection failed.
Microsoft security essentials - Loading definitions failed. Using last good set.
Microsoft security essentials - Engine update failed.
Microsoft security essentials - Definitions update failed.
Microsoft security essentials - Scan error. Scan has stopped.
Microsoft security essentials - Scan stopped before completion.
ASA: Attempt to connect from a blocked (shunned) IP.
ASA: The ASA is disallowing new connections.
ASA: Firewall failover pair communication problem.
ASA: User created or modified on the Firewall.
ASA: Multiple attack in progress messages.

rule.match: Passed filename is not valid, might be malicious

rule.description: Palo Alto Traffic: Session started log on $(device_name).
Palo Alto Traffic: Session ended on $(device_name) from $(source_address) to $(destination_address). Reason: $(session_end_reason).
Palo Alto Traffic: Session dropped on $(device_name) from $(source_address) to $(destination_address). Reason: $(session_end_reason). Action: $(action).
Successful Remote Logon Detected - User:$(win.eventdata.subjectDomainName)\$(win.eventdata.targetUserName) - NTLM authentication, possible pass-the-hash attack.

Successful Remote Logon Detected - User:$(win.eventdata.subjectDomainName)\$(win.eventdata.targetUserName) - NTLM authentication, possible pass-the-hash attack - Possible RDP connection. Verify that $(win.eventdata.workstationName) is allowed to perform RDP connections
Multiple Firewall drop events from same source.
FTD: Attempt to connect from a blocked (shunned) IP.
FTD: Firewall failover pair communication problem.
FTD: User created or modified on the Firewall.
ESET: Warning message was logged from $(hostname).
ESET: Error message was logged from $(hostname).
ESET: Critical message was logged from $(hostname).
$(application) has been granted permission to $(service) at $(time).
$(application) has been denied permission to $(service) at $(time).
Attempt to connect to screen sharing with username $(dstuser) from $(ip_address) failed.
Attempt to connect to screen sharing with username $(dstuser) from $(ip_address) succeeded.
Amazon Security Lake - CloudTrail - Failed API Operation "$(api.operation)" with error "$(api.response.error)" from $(src_endpoint.ip) by user $(identity.user.name).
Amazon Security Lake - CloudTrail - Too many failed API Operations "$(api.response.error)" from $(src_endpoint.ip) ip.
Amazon Security Lake - CloudTrail - Successful API Operation "$(api.operation)" by user $(identity.user.name) from $(src_endpoint.ip) ip.
Amazon Security Lake - CloudTrail - Successful API Operation "$(api.operation)".
Amazon Security Lake - CloudTrail - Successful API Operation "$(api.operation)" from $(src_endpoint.ip) ip.
Amazon Security Lake - CloudTrail - Successful API Operation "$(api.operation)" by user $(identity.user.name).
Attempt to connect to screen sharing with username $(dstuser) from malicious IP $(ip_address) failed.
Attempt to connect to screen sharing with username $(dstuser) from malicious IP $(ip_address) succeeded.
Dovecot authentication from malicious IP $(srcip) failed.
Dovecot authentication from malicious IP $(srcip) was successful.
SQL server login from malicious IP $(srcip) was successful.
SQL server login from malicious IP $(srcip) failed.
Successful remote logon from malicious IP $(win.eventdata.ipAddress).
